title: OhMyFps
description: PVP Client on 1.8.9 with optimizations、essential things and useful resource pack
body:
## What is This?

This is a practical **legacy PVP modpack** that includes **optimizations, features, and cosmetics**, all pre-configured and ready to use. Overall, it is well-suited for **PVP or BedWars scenarios** such as on "Hypixel" or "PikaNetwork".

## Performance Improvements

The modpack comes with a wide range of optimization mods, which can significantly boost performance (actual improvement depends on your PC specs and mod configuration).

## Enhanced Display

One or several mods are used to enrich the vanilla Minecraft interface with more practical information, such as potion effects and armor status. Additionally, more data like health and ping are displayed for other players. Based on the included resource pack, it also incorporates textures commonly used by most YouTubers, such as shorter swords.

## Practical Features

Game-assist functions like auto-sprint are fully equipped to add convenience to your gameplay.

## Tips

(This modpack uses Forge version 1902, which is compatible with Optifine, mods in this modpack are all compatible with Optifine too, using it can improve your gameing experience. If you want to use it, you need to install it by yourself due to the copyright problem(s). Download it at [https://optifine.net/](https://optifine.net/). **WE WON'T AND WE NEVER USE IT IN THIS MODPACK!**)

Give it a try now!

---

## 这是什么？

这是一个实用的**旧版本 PVP 整合包**，包含了一些**优化、功能、外观**内容，并且它们已经预先配置完毕。总体来看，非常适合在“Hypixel”或“落花星雨”等**PVP 或起床战争场景**中使用。

## 性能提升

整合包内置了大量优化模组，能够显著提升游戏性能（具体提升幅度取决于电脑配置，优化效果也与模组设置有关）。

## 丰富显示

整合包使用了一个（或多个）模组，为原版 Minecraft 界面增添了更多实用信息，例如药水效果、盔甲状态等。同时，针对其他玩家也增加了血量、延迟等数据的显示。基于内置资源包，还加入了大多数 UP 主常用的材质，例如更短的剑。

## 实用功能

自动疾跑等游戏辅助功能一应俱全，为你的游戏体验提供便利。

快去试试吧！
